title: Decisions block — extracted candidate item
description: Target schema for auto-extracted DEC-* candidates. POC G uses this as the AJV gate against classifier output. Required fields modelled on .project/decisions.json shape (id, title, status); body optional for the decision case to demonstrate per-schema field divergence vs issues.schema.json.

id.description: Canonical decision identifier (DEC- prefix + 3 or 4 digits).
